name: Compliance Control
description: Structure documentation for a compliance control mapped to regulatory frameworks used in compliance automation platforms.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Short name or title of the control.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed description of what the control requires.

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Compliance domain (Access Control, Encryption, Incident Response, etc.).

fields.name: frameworkId
fields.description: Framework identifier (SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR, PCIDSS).

fields.name: requirementText
fields.description: Verbatim requirement text from the framework.

fields.name: evidenceTypes
fields.description: Types of evidence that satisfy this control.

fields.name: automatable
fields.description: Whether evidence collection can be automated via API.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Implementation status (Not Started, In Progress, Implemented, etc.).
